title: Command palette
summary: Cmd-K quick-open palette with grouped actions, search, and keyboard-first navigation.
brief: Add a Cmd-K / Ctrl-K command palette that opens a dialog, offers a fuzzy-search input, and lists grouped actions (Navigate, Recent, Settings) with keyboard arrow navigation.

steps.reason: Modal shell the command lives inside

checklist.check: Global Cmd-K / Ctrl-K listener opens the dialog (and only inside client code).
Dialog closes after a command is selected, before the action runs.
Palette shows a friendly empty state when no commands match the query.
[Command] Avoid: Forgetting CommandList — items won't be scrollable or grouped properly
[Command] Avoid: Giving CommandItem non-unique values (breaks filtering and controlled state)
[Command] Avoid: Overriding CommandInput className to remove the border/padding — breaks the ⌘K icon layout
[Command] Avoid: Not rendering CommandEmpty — the list looks broken when a search has no matches
[Command] A11y: cmdk wires role=listbox/option and aria-activedescendant. Use the `label` prop on Command for a screen-reader-only name when no visible heading exists.
[Dialog] Avoid: Nesting dialogs inside each other
[Dialog] Avoid: Forgetting DialogTitle (breaks accessibility — screen readers need it)
[Dialog] Avoid: Using DialogDescription for long-form content (keep it short)
[Dialog] Avoid: Putting too many primary actions in DialogFooter
[Dialog] A11y: Radix traps focus, handles Escape to close, and wires aria-labelledby/describedby to DialogTitle/DialogDescription. Always include a DialogTitle.
[Separator] Avoid: Using as spacing instead of semantic separation
[Separator] Avoid: Forgetting orientation='vertical' needs parent height
[Separator] A11y: Set decorative=false if the separator conveys semantic meaning. Radix handles role='separator'.
